title: The Knock Up Stream Erupts
description: The Straw Hats ride the violent Knock Up Stream and commit fully to the impossible path toward Sky Island.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Blackbeard, Zoro. The Straw Hats ride the violent Knock Up Stream and commit fully to the impossible path toward Sky Island.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Okay! Thanks for getting us here!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Aghhhh! Night's already fallen on us!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Sky Island's just some fantasy among fantasies!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A fantasy among fantasies...? You're right!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Exactly, Luffy! I think it's impossible too!

summary: The Straw Hats ride the violent Knock Up Stream and commit fully to the impossible path toward Sky Island.
